INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DEVIOUS.title: Devious
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-DEVIOUS.description: Discard a card. This card's effects trigger one time for each Cost of the discarded card.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CUNNING.title: Cunning
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CUNNING.description: This effect triggers if it is the leftmost card when played.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLEED.title: Bleed
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-BLEED.description: Whenever a card is Exhausted, Bleeding characters lose 6 HP and Bleed decreases by 1.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-INSTINCT.title: Instinct
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-INSTINCT.description: Increases the HP loss caused by Bleed.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-LINGER.title: Linger
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-LINGER.description: If this card is in your hand at the end of your turn, Trigger this effect.
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-STARTUP.title: Startup
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-STARTUP.description: Effect triggers at the start of each combat if this card is in your [gold]Deck[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PICKUP.title: Pickup
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-PICKUP.description: Effect triggers when this card is added to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CARGO.title: Cargo
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-CARGO.description: At the start of your turn, draw 1 card from your [gold]Cargo[/gold].
